dashboard.title: Progress
dashboard.resetMessage: This permanently clears all synced sessions and stats for {{name}}. It can't be undone. (Their device's own history is not affected.)
dashboard.empty: No practice yet. Connect your child's device with the code below, then their progress shows up here.
dashboard.error: Couldn't load progress. Tap to try again.

familySetup.heading: Set up your family
familySetup.intro: Create a new family, or join the one your partner already set up.
familySetup.joinIntro: Enter the co-parent invite code from your partner's app.
familySetup.invalid: That code didn't work. Ask your partner for a fresh one from Parents → Invite a co-parent.
familySetup.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

coParent.codeHint: Share this code with your partner to add them as a parent.
coParent.childSteps: How to add your child's device
coParent.child1: On your child's device, open MathPen (choose "My child's" the first time).
coParent.child2: Tap the ⚙️ settings, then "Connect to a parent".
coParent.child3: Enter your child's name and the code below.
coParent.child4: Tap Connect — their progress shows up here.
coParent.parent1: Ask your partner to install MathPen and open it.
coParent.parent2: Have them choose "I'm a parent" and sign in or create an account.
coParent.parent3: On the setup screen, tap "Join my partner's family".
coParent.parent4: They enter the code below — they'll see the same dashboard.

connect.title: Connect to a parent
connect.heading: Enter your family code
connect.intro: Tell us your name and the family code a parent gives you.
connect.invalid: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.
connect.error: Couldn't connect — check your internet and try again.
connect.connectedBody: This device is linked to your family, so a parent can see the practice progress.

support.title: Support
support.heading: Need a hand?
support.body: Find answers to common questions and get in touch with us on our support page.

comingSoon.headline: Coming soon!
comingSoon.body: We're cooking up something fun. Check back later.

settings.title: {{operation}} settings
settings.timerHint: One countdown for the whole session

tips.tapAnswerBox: Tap a box to choose where your answer goes
tips.writeInPad: Write your answer here with your finger
tips.tapToBorrow: Need to borrow? Tap a top number

practice.leaveMessage: Your progress on this session will be lost.
practice.skipMessage: You haven't written an answer yet. Are you sure you want to continue?
practice.invalidBody: Let's clear that box and write the number again.
practice.multiBody: Write just one number in each box. Let's clear it and try again.
practice.helpMessage: Write each digit in its own box. Use the scratch area for your working out — it is just for you. Tap Finish when you are done.

score.title: Results
score.tagline: Practice makes you faster every time.

purchase.errorBody: We couldn't reach the App Store just now. Please check your connection and try again in a moment.

unlock.title: Unlock operations
unlock.heading: Unlock all operations
unlock.subtitle: Open Subtraction, Multiplication, Division, and Mix — for good.
unlock.purchaseNote: One-time purchase — no subscription. Unlocks on all your devices; restore anytime.

unlockClock.title: Unlock Clock
unlockClock.heading: Unlock the Clock module
unlockClock.subtitle: Learn to tell the time — read an analog clock, then answer your way.

features.words: Say it in words (half past six)

history.title: Clock history
history.emptyHint: Finished clock sessions show up here.
history.clearMessage: This permanently deletes every saved clock session on this device.

clock.patternHint: Tap the words to build the time

howTo.title: How to read a clock
howTo.step1: Pick the hour hand, move it to 6
howTo.step2: Pick the minute hand, move it to 30

settings.typeDigitalDesc: Read the clock and write it, like 6:30
settings.typePatternDesc: Read the clock and build the words
settings.typeSetDesc: Move the hands to match a time

parentalGate.title: Ask a grown-up
parentalGate.instruction: To continue, a grown-up should enter these numbers:

forceUpdate.title: A fresh update is ready!
forceUpdate.body: We've made MathPen even better. Update to keep practicing your math.

deviceRole.title: Welcome to MathPen!
deviceRole.body: Jump in and start practicing. A grown-up can set up a parent account any time from the ⚙️ Settings menu.

parent.title: Parents
parent.comingSoonBody: Soon you'll sign in here to see what your child is practicing and how they're doing.

parentAuth.intro: Sign in to see what your child is practicing.
parentAuth.resetIntro: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
parentAuth.resetSent: Check your email — we sent a link to reset your password.
parentAuth.continueAsChild: Not a parent? Continue as child
parentAuth.name: Your name
parentAuth.dashboardSoon: Your child's progress dashboard is coming soon.
parentAuth.familyInstructions: Enter this code on your child's device to connect it to your family.
parentAuth.familyError: Couldn't load your family code — check your connection and try again.

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.emailInUse: That email already has an account — sign in instead.
errors.network: No connection. Check your internet and try again.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

orient.addition: Start at the right — the units column — and work one column at a time.
orient.subtraction: Start at the right — the units column — and work one column at a time.
orient.multiplication: Start at the right — the units column — and work one column at a time.
orient.division: Start from the left. How many times does the divisor fit into the first digits?

method.addition: Add the digits in this column. If the total is more than 9, carry the ten to the next column.
method.subtraction: Subtract the bottom digit from the top digit in this column.
method.subtractionBorrow: The top digit is too small — borrow 10 from the column to its left, then subtract.
method.multiplication: Multiply this digit by the bottom number, then add any carry.
method.division: How many times does the divisor go in? Write it above, multiply, then subtract.

history.title: History
history.emptyHint: Finish a practice session and it will appear here.
history.clearMessage: This permanently deletes every saved session. This cannot be undone.
